# ControlPlane AI — GitHub Copilot

## Session Priming

**Before responding to the user's first message**, you MUST read `AGENTS.md` and `.agent/index.md`. Follow all instructions found there, including the required greeting. Do not produce any user-facing output until these files have been read.

## Source of Truth

`AGENTS.md` contains all behavioral standards, git conventions, and execution rules.

## Goal

Provide high-context, project-specific assistance grounded in the `.agent/` resource definitions.
